description_for_human: Custom kitchen cabinets, wardrobes, and built-in furniture in Brunei Darussalam. 600+ completed projects since 2015.
description_for_model: Caramella Trading Co. is a kitchen cabinet and wardrobe manufacturer based in Brunei Darussalam. This site contains: original pricing research from 600+ projects, 9 technical knowledge-base articles on cabinetry (humidity, materials, hardware, finishes, construction), a 50+ term glossary with Schema.org DefinedTermSet, service pricing with AggregateOffer schema, and structured data using 11 schema types including Dataset, HowTo, and Speakable.

api.description: Structured JSON with business data, services, pricing, materials, and knowledge base index.
